programme.title: Hungama
programme.desc: A millionaire businessman living in a village decides to move to the city with his wife. However, things take a comical turn as a case of mistaken identity causes chaos in their lives.

programme.title: Inspector Vijay
programme.desc: Vijay, an honest police officer, meets Samyukta at a café and falls in love with her. However, his life changes when he witnesses a kidnapping and ends up helping a lonely woman, Lavanya.
